creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #9)

Regarding DOCS -- of course, it's even globally disabled on my machine already.

I commented path definition in my .cshrc, so only login.conf defines it. After logging in (even without lightdm restart, perhaps it starts new process?) ~ got expanded to my homedir, so the issue is resolved.
Thanks again!
